__body.sql:
SELECT  TACM.API_ID,
            TACM.TABLE_NM,
            TACM.COLUMN_NM,
            TACM.DATA_TYPE,
            TO_CHAR(TACM.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME,
            TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD
    FROM    DATAHUB.TB_API_COL_MST TACM
    INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TACM.API_ID = TAM.API_ID
    WHERE   TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'O'
        AND TACM.API_ID = 38
            LIMIT 30 OFFSET 0
